title: Test

scenes.title: Opening Hook
scenes.voText: The village lies wrapped in a cloak of silence, the air cool and crisp under the fading night sky. Just before the sun peeks over the horizon, a faint light begins to stir in the eastern sky, hinting at the day to come. The world is still, as if holding its breath, waiting for the first sounds of life to break the spell. Somewhere, a rooster crows, its call sharp and clear, signaling the start of a new day.
scenes.visualPrompt: historical scene at dawn in a village

scenes.title: Chapter One — Morning Rituals
scenes.voText: In the soft light of dawn, a farmer rises from his straw-filled mattress...
scenes.visualPrompt: a farmer waking up in a medieval cottage

scenes.title: Chapter Two — Work and Commerce
scenes.voText: The marketplace slowly comes to life as merchants set up their stalls...

scenes.title: Chapter Three — Food and Meals
scenes.voText: The aroma of freshly baked bread fills the air...
scenes.visualPrompt: a medieval kitchen with bread baking

scenes.title: Chapter Four — Social Life and Community
scenes.voText: Children play in the village square, their laughter ringing out...
scenes.visualPrompt: children playing in a medieval village square

scenes.title: Chapter Five — Evening
scenes.voText: As the sun dips below the horizon, the village is bathed in a golden glow...

scenes.title: Chapter Six — Nighttime
scenes.voText: Candles flicker in windows as the village settles into the quiet of night...
scenes.visualPrompt: a medieval village at night with candlelit windows

scenes.title: Closing Reflection
scenes.voText: The world has quieted, leaving only the soft rustle of leaves and the distant call of a night bird...

youtubeHooks: Experience a day in the life of a medieval village.
Discover the daily rituals of history's forgotten people.
Uncover the sounds and scents of a bygone era.
tweetHooks: Step back in time for a day in a medieval village.
Explore the daily life of history's ordinary people.
Feel the past come alive as night falls on history.
episodeSummary: Journey through a day in a medieval village, from dawn to dusk, exploring the lives of ordinary people. Feel the textures and hear the sounds of a world long past as the village settles into night.
